old_claim.note: Electrical Grid (Early Distribution) supports manufacturing, deployment, commercialization, or operational scaling.

new_claim.note: A utility-grid connection is constitutive of grid-scale battery storage and supplied the operating environment for BEST testing and grid services.

source_shape.source_locator: U.S. Congress Office of Technology Assessment, Chapter 9, report pp. 280-281 (PDF pp. 29-30): BEST is a national center for grid-connected battery modules and the listed applications are utility-grid services.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The first megawatt-scale test milestone operated batteries as part of an electric utility system.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The node is explicitly grid-scale battery storage; without a grid connection it would be a different stationary or standalone battery category.

ontology_before: The grid was treated merely as a commercialization aid to a node defined by grid connection and grid services.
ontology_after: The electrical grid is a required direct prerequisite of grid-scale battery storage.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-16-grid-battery-green-hydrogen-boundary: electrical_grid_early_distribution is required.
would_reject_if: The node is rescoped to standalone stationary batteries rather than utility-grid systems.
short_reason: A utility grid is constitutive of grid-scale battery storage.
